role: Core Rust library that executes shell commands across many directories — serial or rayon-parallel, with include/exclude filters, dry-run, JSON output, and progress bars. It is the command-execution engine underlying the meta CLI's cross-repo operations (meta exec et al.).
northstar: Meta makes multi-repo feel like monorepo without the downsides; the canon machinery stays green, versioned by the parent distribution.
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003)
